debug_option.description: Enable JTAG debugging and traces for all execution levels.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL hypervisor.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 0.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 1.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 2.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 3.

fuse.name: READ_PERMISSIONS_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: WRITE_PERMISSIONS_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: FEC_ENABLES_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_CONFIGURATION_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: PUBLIC_KEY_HASH_0_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned. Once blown no further changes possible to QFPROM sheet via sec.elf.

fuse.name: OEM_SPARE_30_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_SPARE_31_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: FEC supported. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: E_DLOAD_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for boot. Disable the removable SD and then USB downloader in Apps PBL error handler, as well as the method to force download during code boot via magic cookies in IMEM.

fuse.name: ENUM_TIMEOUT
fuse.description: SW only use for boot. BOOT ROM must support USB enumeration timeout. Timeout applies to both enumeration for FLCB (fast low current boot) and USB download mode. If USB is not enumerated within time (90 seconds), quit USB enumeration If USB suspend or disconnected after enumeration, start timer again.

fuse.name: FORCE_DLOAD_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for boot. To disable method to force boot from USB via GPIO or magic number in RAM.

fuse.name: FAST_BOOT
fuse.description:
These fuses are used by boot code to specify which device has priority to be booted from. For QAM8650P, the mapping is as follows:
Following change is needed for fast boot options: 0: Default OSPI.

fuse.name: SPI_CLK_BOOT_FREQ
fuse.description: Default is 37.5 MHz and when blown 19.2 MHz.

fuse.name: SW_FUSE_PROG_DISABLE
fuse.description: This fuse disables the ability to write fuses through the software interface.

fuse.name: PBL_FDL_TIMEOUT_RESET_FEATURE_ENABLE.
fuse.description: Fuse bit to reset device if PBL enters into EDL mode unintentionally.

fuse.name: WDOG_EN
fuse.description: Combined with GPIO Wdog disable (connects to MPM). Prevents the Watch Dog from being disabled by the GPIO.

fuse.name: PBL_LOG_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for boot. Control logging mechanism in Boot ROM (If blown, Logging is disabled & mandated for external parts).

fuse.name: ROOT_CERT_TOTAL_NUM
fuse.description: Defines the total root cert number supported from the certificate (Upto 4 roots).

fuse.name: USB_SS_DISABLE
fuse.description: Used to disable USB SS enumeration during Boot.

fuse.name: MSS_HASH_INTEGRITY_CHECK_ENABLE
fuse.description: Enables Hash computation/verification of individual ELF segments in PBL.

fuse.name: DEBUG_POLICY_DISABLE
fuse.description: Debug Policy is bypassed when this bit is 1. Debug Policy provides a means to re-enable debug capabilities under OEM-specified selectable conditions.

fuse.name: ALL_DEBUG_DISABLE
fuse.description: This fuse permanently disables all debug of the chip. This should only be blown once the OEM is done with their development and testing. No RMAs are possible after this fuse is blown.

fuse.name: TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE
fuse.description: Enable FIPS mode for TZ software crypto. Disable by default and blow to enable.

fuse.name: TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_OVERRIDE
fuse.description: Override TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE fuse. Non-override by default and blow to override the TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE fuse to disable the FIPS feature in TZ.

fuse.name: SPARE_REG30_SECURE
fuse.description: This fuse determines if the corresponding OEM spare region is treated as secure. If blown, it indicates secure, and the region has the properties of a customer private key, and is not readable through SW while debug is enabled. Qualcomm doesn’t recommend using OEM SPARE regions for storing security keys, since these regions are only accessible by the SW.

fuse.name: SPARE_REG31_SECURE
fuse.description: This fuse determines if the corresponding OEM spare region is treated as secure. If blown, it indicates secure, and the region has the properties of a customer private key, and is not readable through SW while debug is enabled. Qualcomm doesn’t recommend using OEM SPARE regions for storing security keys, since these regions are only accessible by the SW.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT0
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_0 is used to determine segment hash computation algorithm with MRC 0 Indexed Root Certificate enabled. 0 means SHA384, 1 means SHA256.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT1
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_1 is used to determine segment hash computation algorithm with MRC 1 Indexed Root Certificate enabled. 0 means SHA384, 1 means SHA256.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT2
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_2 is used to determine segment hash computation algorithm with MRC 2 Indexed Root Certificate enabled. 0 means SHA384, 1 means SHA256.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT3
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_3 is used to determine segment hash computation algorithm with MRC 3 Indexed Root Certificate enabled. 0 means SHA384, 1 means SHA256.

fuse.name: EKU_ENFORCEMENT_EN
fuse.description: When this fuse is blown will enable enforcement of the EKU field in the certificate.

fuse.name: DISABLE_RSA
fuse.description: When this bit is 0 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC is 0 => RSA OPERATION_x000D_ When this bit is 0 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC IS 1=> ECC OPERATION USING PKA IP_x000D_ When this bit is 1 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC is 0 => Error_x000D_ When this bit is 1 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC IS 1=> ECC OPERATION USING PKA IP.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX0
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX1
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX2
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX3
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_PK_HASH_IN_FUSE
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_AUTH_EN
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_USE_SERIAL_NUM
fuse.description: Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: FEC_189
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.
